_doc: Queue for image assets generated during daytime art passes. Use tools/next_art_prompt.py to print the next pending prompt, generate it in DiffusionBee or ComfyUI, then run tools/process_pixel_asset.sh.

assets.prompt: Small original fire drake hatchling, compact full-body silhouette, deep red-orange scales, cream belly, two tiny horns, folded wings, little flame tail, confident expression. Crisp GBA-era pixel art battle sprite, 64x64, strong dark pixel outline, limited 16-color palette, cel shaded, centered, transparent or pure white background.
